clipList.emptyDesc: Copy something to your clipboard and it will appear here.
clipList.noMatchesDesc: Try a different search or clear the current filters.
clipList.emptyFolderDesc: Move a clip here or choose another folder.
clipList.noImagesDesc: Copy an image or switch back to All.
clipList.noTextDesc: Copy some text or switch back to All.
clipList.noFilesDesc: Copy a file or switch back to All.
clipList.loadFailedDesc: Cubby kept your data. Try loading it again.

pasteContext.ninjaCopy: Ninja Remote · Select, then press Ctrl+V

settings.title: Settings
settings.ocrUnavailableDesc: Windows OCR is unavailable. Install an OCR language pack in Windows Language settings, then retry.
settings.ocrIndexDesc: Cubby indexes screenshot text locally in the background. Images are never uploaded.
settings.ocrRetryQueued: Queued {{count}} images for another OCR attempt
settings.floatAboveTaskbarDesc: Show the window on top of the taskbar
settings.startupWithWindowsPortable: Not available in the portable version (it never touches the registry).
settings.roundCornersDesc: Use rounded corners for the Cubby flyout.
settings.hotkeyDesc: Shortcut to show or hide Cubby
settings.remotePasteModeDesc: Choose how Cubby handles clips selected while a supported remote-control app is focused.
settings.remotePasteCopyDesc: Recommended for large logs and everyday use. Cubby restores the remote app, then you press Ctrl+V.
settings.remotePasteKeystrokesDesc: Automatically types short text through Ninja Remote. Slow for large content.
settings.remoteHotkeyHint: Your hotkey opens Cubby inside remote sessions when the remote client's keyboard forwarding is off. With forwarding on, open Cubby from the tray icon.
settings.dittoImportDesc: Bring your clipboard history and pinned items over from a Ditto database.
settings.dittoImportConfirm: Import {{count}} clips from Ditto? Items already in Cubby are skipped.
settings.dittoImportPartial: Imported {{count}} clips from Ditto; {{failed}} could not be imported
settings.dittoNothingToImport: No importable clips were found in that Ditto database.
settings.dittoAllDuplicates: Everything in that Ditto database is already in Cubby.
settings.replaceWinVDesc: Cubby takes over Win+V, so Windows Clipboard History will not open. Emoji picker remains available with Win+Period.
settings.ignoredAppsDesc: Don't capture clipboard from these apps
settings.clearHistoryMessage: Are you sure you want to clear your ENTIRE clipboard history? This cannot be undone.
settings.skipSensitiveDesc: When an app such as a password manager marks a copy as sensitive, Cubby won't save it (Windows' own clipboard history does the same). Turn this off to capture everything, including passwords.
settings.generalSubtitle: How Cubby looks and behaves on this PC.
settings.privacySubtitle: Choose what Cubby remembers, and manage what it already has.
settings.foldersSubtitle: Group pinned clips into folders you can jump to.
settings.aboutSubtitle: Version, updates, and the open-source project.
settings.sidebarNote: Encrypted and local-only. No account required.
settings.windowEffectDesc: Surface style of the popup window.
settings.densityDesc: Fit more clips, or show larger previews.
settings.clipboardHistoryDesc: Encrypted in Cubby's database on this computer. Nothing leaves your PC.
settings.removeDuplicatesDesc: Collapse repeated clips into a single entry.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Permanently delete every stored clip on this PC.
settings.privacyNote: Cubby's desktop app sends no product analytics, and your clipboard history never leaves this computer.
settings.openSourceNote: Cubby is GPL-3.0, a fork of PastePaw. © 2026 SouthForge AI.

clearHistory.unpinnedMessage: Remove every unpinned item from Cubby? Your pinned items will stay.
clearHistory.allMessage: Remove every item from Cubby, including pinned items? This cannot be undone.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Cubby
onboarding.intro: Cubby keeps a history of everything you copy, so you can paste it back whenever you need it.
onboarding.pointOpen: Press Win+V any time to open Cubby.
onboarding.pointAuto: Everything you copy is saved here automatically — no extra steps.
onboarding.pointUse: Click an item (or press Enter) to paste it. Pin the ones you want to keep.
onboarding.pointPrivate: Your history is encrypted and stays on this PC. Nothing is uploaded.

updater.failed: Update failed. Please try again later.
